feat(slides): connect InstitutionKit branding to visual generation pipeline

- Add "brand" color scheme to infographic COLOR_SCHEMES, dynamically

  auto-default behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix settings not visible across modules (rebinding vs in-place update)

The root cause: all modules did `from .config import settings` which
creates a local reference. When load_settings/update_settings rebound
the name to a new AppSettings object, other modules still held the
old empty-defaults object. Now settings are updated in-place via
setattr so all references see changes immediately.

- Add `url` and `project` fields to ResponsePayload for all
  conversation commands (ask, deep-research, read)
- Make `--chat <id>` imply `--continue` (no need for both flags)

commit.message:
fix: NE555 R2 wiring bug + USB ESD protection + stale docs

Critical fixes from deep architecture review (ECO #2026-03-HWR2):

1. NE555 R2 wiring: both pins were on the same net (tmr_thr),
   shorting R2 out. Added intermediate node HB_TMR_NODE_A between
   R1 and R2, with DIS tapping node_a. Duty cycle now correct
   at 0.07% instead of ~50%.

2. USB ESD: added USBLC6-2SC6 dual-channel TVS on all 4 stinger
   port D+/D- pairs. IEC 61000-4-2 compliant (±15kV air, ±8kV
   contact).

3. USB-A male Shield pin: added try/except fallback for male plug
   footprints that may not expose separate Shield pads.

4. Stale docs: pin 21 (SPI3_MISO → STINGER_EN_4), Ethernet port
   (Hub 2 port 2, not Hub 1 port 4), LDO name (AP2112K, not
   LM1117), resistor value notation (5k1 → 5.1k).

5. Crystal separation rules: added 12 MHz hub crystal constraints
   to PLACEMENT_CONSTRAINTS.md (≥8mm between hubs, ≥10mm from
   25/26 MHz crystals).

6. BOM: corrected passive counts for 4 stingers, added ESD parts.

7. Removed unused vcc_5v parameter from _build_usb_hubs().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
refactor: extract duplicated opportunity save logic to persistence service

opportunity_scanner.py and tavily_scanner.py both contained identical
~40-line INSERT blocks and separate copies of parse_deadline under
different names (_parse_deadline vs parse_deadline).

Extract to services/persistence.py:
- parse_deadline() — single canonical implementation
- save_opportunities() — handles embed, dedup check, INSERT, commit

Both scanners now call save_opportunities(); seen_urls is updated in
place so tavily_scanner no longer needs to return a saved_urls list.

commit.message:
feat: dark/light mode toggle with persistent preference

Theme system:
- Dark mode is DEFAULT (original yellow/dark palette: #08080F bg, #FFD000 gold)
- Light mode available via toggle (warm neutral: #FAFBF7 bg, #C9A66B gold)
- Preference persisted to localStorage ('wh-theme' key)
- Applied via 'html.light' CSS class — zero flicker on page load

CSS architecture:
- :root contains dark mode tokens (no class required = dark by default)
- html.light overrides all color tokens to light palette
- New CSS variables: --wh-nav-bg, --wh-gold-text, --wh-gold-hover,
  --wh-logo-gradient, --wh-scrollbar (all theme-aware)
- bg-mesh gradients adapt per theme via html.light override
- All hardcoded hex colors replaced with CSS variables

Toggle UI:
- Mobile header: compact pill button (Sun/Moon icon + label) top-right
- Desktop sidebar: full-width row button in footer with emoji badge
- Both update reactively via singleton useTheme composable
- Hover effect: pill fills with gold on hover

src/composables/useTheme.js (new):
- Singleton reactive state (isDark shared across all components)
- applyTheme() called at module-load time (before Vue mounts)
- App.vue imports it to ensure initialization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add course management system with multi-coach and flexible dates

- Replace Boss "排課" tab with "課程" tab for formal course management

commit.message:
v2.7.2: fix card misalignment on first load (#2)

Cards were placed in wrong columns on first render because offsetTop = 0
for newly-appended items before the browser paints. The column-fill
algorithm saw r.gppu = 0 for right-column items, causing subsequent
items to keep going right.

Fix: add a requestAnimationFrame corrective refresh at the end of
_initItems() so positions are recalculated after first paint. Covers
init(), addItems(), and initNewItems() code paths.

Closes #2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Soften beat reactivity: natural breathing instead of electric flicker

AudioAnalyser:
- Raise MIN_BEAT_INTERVAL 0.18s -> 0.35s (only main beats, not transients)
- Raise detection threshold 1.4x -> 1.8x (skip weak hits)
- Reduce beatPulse intensity multiplier 2.5 -> 1.8
- Slow all smoothing speeds for gentler transitions

CSS (style.css):
- Lyrics glow: 18px -> 10px max, transitions 0.06s -> 0.25s
- Lyrics scale: 1.5% -> 0.8% max pulse
- Word active: scale 1.08 -> 1.04, glow reduced
- Word transitions: 0.15s -> 0.3s ease
- Phone frame glow: 20px -> 12px, transition 0.1s -> 0.3s

Zone2/Player:
- Beat text glow multiplied by 0.7 before applying
- Background flash: only on strong beats (>0.3), slower decay (0.88 -> 0.92)
- Meaning panel core scale: 12% -> 5%, glow reduced

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix crash when unhandled exceptions escape QTimer slots

PyQt6 calls abort() when a Python exception propagates out of any Qt
slot. The 150ms poll timer and the transcription_ready signal slot had
insufficient exception handling: serial.SerialException (e.g. USB
disconnect) was not caught by the ProtocolError handlers, and the bulk
of _poll() ran outside the try block entirely.

- protocol.py: catch Exception (not just ProtocolError) in
  get_received_channel_info() so serial/OS errors return None
- log_panel._poll(): move all post-poll logic inside the try block and
  broaden the except to catch any unexpected error
- log_panel._on_transcription_ready(): wrap in try/except to protect
  the queued slot from background-thread signal delivery

commit.message:
fix: health check via container IP and reliable frontend polling

- Health check now uses container's Docker network IP directly instead
  of only host.docker.internal (fixes unreachable host port from
  internal Docker networks)
- Frontend polling tracks the status at action start time, only stops
  polling after status actually changes to a final state (fixes
  premature polling stop when status hadn't updated yet)
